title: Tofu's tasty modpack
description: Technologically advanced rpg with lots of magic.
body:
This modpack is perfect for someone who likes anime, tech, magic, exploration, and action rpg elements. Powered by Essential, you can join your friends with ease.

Explore new areas with a Better End, Twilight Forest, and Space Exploration!
Become even more powerful with Ars Nouveau, Mine Mine no Mi, and Tensura!
Automate tasks with Create, Immersive Engineering, and Mekanism!

This modpack might not be for you if you dislike complex automation and mechanics!

Keep in mind that a lot of key binds will need to be changed to make this playable, which is why I included a mod that assists with this process by adding a comprehensive search bar. Don't forget to leave the world on default to ensure proper biome generation.

Feel free to do what you want with this modpack as long as I am credited.

Enjoy and don't forget that you can support me on ko-fi!
